newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The relevant catalysts (Q1 FY27 reported May 27 with +56% revenue, record $11.9B backlog, raised FY27 guidance, Power Solutions data-center exposure) all predate the June 9 window and were already in the prior case. Q2 FY27 guide of $1.94-2.01B was issued with that release.

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent AI-supply-chain lens: fiber backhaul/DCI thesis intact and strengthening (record backlog, data-center capex), but the Q1 beat and raised guide predate June 9 and were in the prior case. No new info since; +4.3% move is flow. Hold.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Continued AI/data-center fiber buildout and carrier capex recovery feeding record backlog.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Carrier capex cyclicality and labor/execution margin slippage on a low-multiple services model.
verdicts.bull: Record $11.9B backlog (+46%) and 2.2x book-to-bill give multi-quarter visibility on AI-era fiber/DCI demand.
verdicts.neutral: Strong fundamentals but a services-multiple, not a tech re-rate; latent-node fit is indirect connectivity exposure.
verdicts.bear: Cyclical carrier capex and thin margins; consensus Strong Buy leaves limited under-coverage edge.
